title: Fresh Flaky Thai Yellow Masarepa Bowl
description: A light, steam‑cooked bowl featuring yellow masa harina tortillas topped with a zesty lime‑fish sauce dressing, fresh shredded veggies, and pickled radish—perfectly FODMAP‑friendly.
instructions: Whisk masa harina, turmeric powder, and salt in a bowl until well combined.
Add warm water and coconut milk, stirring until a smooth dough forms.
Cover the dough and let it rest for 15 minutes.
Divide the dough into 8 equal portions and flatten each into a thin disc using a rolling pin or a flat lid.
Steam the masa discs in a steamer basket over boiling water for 5 minutes until cooked through.
While the masa is steaming, whisk together lime zest, lime juice, fish sauce, and chili flakes to make a quick dressing.
Toss the shredded vegetables with the dressing until evenly coated.
When the masa is ready, cut each disc into bite‑sized squares.
Arrange the masa squares in the bottom of a bowl, then top with the dressed vegetables and pickled radish.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
